hooks.command: echo "💰 Mooney Finance App | Branch: $(git branch --show-current) | Uncommitted: $(git status --short | wc -l | tr -d ' ') files | Last commit: $(git log --oneline -1 2>/dev/null || echo 'No commits')"

if [ -f "$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR/composeApp/build.gradle.kts" ]; then echo "📱 Android SDK: $(grep 'compileSdk' "$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR/composeApp/build.gradle.kts" | grep -o '[0-9]*' | head -1) | Kotlin: $(grep 'kotlin' "$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR/gradle/libs.versions.toml" | grep -o '[0-9]\.[0-9]\.[0-9]*' | head -1)"; fi

echo "⚠️ CRITICAL REMINDERS AFTER CONTEXT COMPACT:
- Database is version 8 with 7 entities. NEVER downgrade version or remove entities.
- NEVER use git add . — always add files explicitly.
- NEVER swallow CancellationException in coroutines.
- Both DatabaseFactory files (Android + iOS) must register ALL migrations.
- Run /review before declaring work complete."

CMD="$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT"; if echo "$CMD" | grep -qE '(push\s+--force|push\s+-f\b|reset\s+--hard|clean\s+-f|checkout\s+\.|restore\s+\.|branch\s+-D)'; then echo '🛑 BLOCKED: Destructive git command detected. Ask the user for confirmation first.' >&2; exit 2; fi; exit 0

if echo "$CLAUDE_FILE_PATHS" | grep -q '\.kt$'; then KT_FILE=$(echo "$CLAUDE_FILE_PATHS" | tr ':' '\n' | grep '\.kt$' | head -1); if grep -nE '\b(print\(|println\()' "$KT_FILE" 2>/dev/null; then echo '⚠️  Direct print/println detected. Use proper logging instead.'; fi; fi

if echo "$CLAUDE_FILE_PATHS" | grep -q '\.kt$'; then KT_FILE=$(echo "$CLAUDE_FILE_PATHS" | tr ':' '\n' | grep '\.kt$' | head -1); if grep -nE 'collectAsState\(\)' "$KT_FILE" 2>/dev/null | grep -v 'collectAsStateWithLifecycle'; then echo '⚠️  collectAsState() detected. Use collectAsStateWithLifecycle() instead.'; fi; fi

if echo "$CLAUDE_FILE_PATHS" | grep -q '\.kt$'; then KT_FILE=$(echo "$CLAUDE_FILE_PATHS" | tr ':' '\n' | grep '\.kt$' | head -1); if grep -nE 'catch.*Exception.*\{' "$KT_FILE" 2>/dev/null | grep -v 'CancellationException' | grep -v '//' | head -3; then echo '⚠️  Generic exception catch without CancellationException rethrow. Check coroutine safety.'; fi; fi

if echo "$CLAUDE_FILE_PATHS" | grep -q 'Entity\.kt$\|AppDatabase\.kt$\|Migrations\.kt$'; then echo '🗄️  DATABASE FILE MODIFIED — Verify: version number correct, all entities listed, migration registered in both DatabaseFactory files.'; fi

if echo "$CLAUDE_FILE_PATHS" | grep -q '\.kt$'; then KT_FILE=$(echo "$CLAUDE_FILE_PATHS" | tr ':' '\n' | grep '\.kt$' | head -1); if grep -nE '\b(print\(|println\()' "$KT_FILE" 2>/dev/null; then echo '⚠️  Direct print/println detected. Use proper logging instead.'; fi; fi

if echo "$CLAUDE_FILE_PATHS" | grep -q '\.kt$'; then KT_FILE=$(echo "$CLAUDE_FILE_PATHS" | tr ':' '\n' | grep '\.kt$' | head -1); if grep -nE 'collectAsState\(\)' "$KT_FILE" 2>/dev/null | grep -v 'collectAsStateWithLifecycle'; then echo '⚠️  collectAsState() detected. Use collectAsStateWithLifecycle() instead.'; fi; fi

if echo "$CLAUDE_FILE_PATHS" | grep -q 'Entity\.kt$\|AppDatabase\.kt$\|Migrations\.kt$'; then echo '🗄️  DATABASE FILE MODIFIED — Verify: version number correct, all entities listed, migration registered in both DatabaseFactory files.'; fi
